name: 事实与细节
subject: english
domain_name: 信息性文本 / Reading Informational / Reading Informational
curriculum_points: 1. With prompting and support, ask and answer questions about key details in a text. 2. With prompting and support, identify the main topic and retell key details of a text. 3. With prompting and support, describe the connection between two individuals, events, ideas, or pieces of information in a text.
